pages.raw_text:
Twenty-Five million dollars to be
invested and $4,000 men to be hired
if the city of Spokane can furnish
l.. Carr with water power enough
to turn the wheels of his factory.


Such is the substance of a letter
received by the mayor a few days
ago. The letter, as printed below,
is written from Atchison, Kan, and
signed by l.. Carr. 1t reads as fol-
lows:


HAS your city got strong, fine
water power. If so what, if any.
thing, would your people do to get
any part or all of the nancy lines
of Reliable Sound manufacturing
represented by inclosed printed Cir
culer-all Stable lines. Am now
ravling-looking over the CRATE
west with expectations of lokating
in Some place.


"Your reply if any will find me III
Butte, Mont, about Oct. 3, general
delivery. BUSINESS will employ Is
